name: Sugared Orange Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients into a bowl.
2. Stir in orange zest and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk egg and orange juice until foamy.
4. Add walnuts to the egg mixture and stir until evenly coated.
5. Divide walnuts among three bowls.
6. Toss each portion with the sugar mixture until evenly coated.
7. Spread the nuts in a single layer on a baking sheet.
8. Bake at 250°F for 1 hour, or until dry and completely cooled.
9. Store in a tightly covered container for up to one month.
